content: Free pixel fonts for a wordmark logo: monogram (datagoblin, itch.io) is CC0 monospace bitmap; Kenney Fonts pack (KenPixel family, KenVector Future) is CC0/CC-BY-SA depending on source — kenney.nl states CC0; Pixel Operator (Jayvee Enaguas) is SIL OFL. All permit game embedding. For a logo, a display pixel font + manual letterform editing is the common indie approach.
